title: minuartia rubra subsp. fastigiata
intro: Minuartia rubra subsp. fastigiata, also known as the red sandwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Minuartia rubra subsp. fastigiata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
